description:
The Modrinth App is a unique, open source Minecraft launcher that allows you to play your favorite mods, and keep them up to date, all in one neat little package.


Fixed
- Fixed hidden files showing up in the Content tab on instances.
- Fixed 'Advanced rendering' option not being applied to most of the interface.
- Modrinth Hosting: Fixed content install flow breaking if you refresh the page mid-install.

Changed
- Modrinth Hosting: Improved stability of content install flow.
